title: Addi Service Spec
description: Schema for Addi platform service specifications. Validates the output of the Starlark DSL constructors (api, worker, cronjob, job). Used by AI agents and the generator CLI for validation before generating Kubernetes manifests.

type.description: Workload type - determines generated resources and rollout strategy

name.description: Service name - lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens allowed. Used as K8s resource name and label.

owner.description: Owning team identifier, e.g. 'team-payments'. Must match CODEOWNERS team.

language.description: Runtime language - used for default base image selection

exposure.description: Traffic exposure. cloudfront=external via CloudFront+WAF, private=internal only, public=ALB direct (deprecated - use cloudfront)

port.description: Container port the service listens on

protocol.description: Service protocol - affects load balancer and health check configuration

health_check.description: HTTP health check path (liveness and readiness probes)

data_classification.description: SFC Circular 020/2022 data classification. restricted=encryption mandatory at rest and in transit, additional audit logging

replicas.description: Desired replica count. Overridden per environment in deploy/*.star files.

resources.description: Container resource requests. Limits are set to 2x requests by default.

rollout.description: Rollout strategy configuration. Generated by canary(), rolling(), or blue_green() helpers.

strategy.description: Deployment strategy. api() defaults to canary, worker() defaults to rolling

steps.description: Canary traffic weight steps, e.g. [10, 50, 100]. Last step must be 100 (enforced in prod).

pause.description: Pause duration between canary steps, e.g. '5m', '1h'

analysis.description: AnalysisTemplate name for canary gates, e.g. 'canary-health'

auto_promotion_seconds.description: Blue-green auto-promotion delay in seconds. 0 = manual promotion.

autoscaling.description: HPA configuration. Generated by hpa() helper.

cpu_target.description: CPU utilization target percentage for HPA

memory_target.description: Memory utilization target percentage for HPA

slos.description: Service Level Objectives. Generated by slo() calls in service.star.

service.description: Service name this SLO applies to

availability.description: Availability SLO percentage, e.g. 99.95. exposure=cloudfront requires >= 99.9

depends_on.description: Service dependencies. Used to generate CiliumNetworkPolicy egress rules. Format: ':local-component', '//domain:service', or '//domain:infra-resource'

secrets.description: Secret references. Generated by secrets_manager() or ssm(). Never contains actual secret values.

key.description: Secret key or path in the provider

field.description: JSON field within a JSON-valued secret

version.description: Secret version stage (Secrets Manager) or label

env.description: Static environment variables. No secrets - use secrets[] for sensitive values. Values must not contain secret patterns (enforced by validator).

command.description: Container command override (entrypoint). Used for worker and cronjob types.

schedule.description: Cron schedule string for cronjob type, e.g. '0 */4 * * *'

concurrency_policy.description: CronJob concurrency policy. Forbid recommended for reconciliation jobs.

spot.description: Use Spot instances. Safe for stateless workers. Not recommended for api() types.

version.description: Version source. Generated by kargo_freight(), git_sha(), or static_version().
